inputs.price_source: Yahoo Finance ABX regular market price 2026-06-11
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $25.68M minus capital spending $0.93M, divided by 99.23M diluted weighted-average shares (10-K filed 2026-03-13)
inputs.dividend_source: Cash dividend declared $0.20 per share November 2025 (S-3 filing 2025-11-25)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses GAAP owner cash; life-settlement policy maturities make operating cash lumpy (Q1 2026 OCF $91.7M vs FY2025 $25.7M). Adjusted EBITDA cited in narrative only, not in FCF0.

bear.notes: Mortality assumption miss; funding cost spike; integration drag from Carlisle/FCF deals

base.notes: Life Solutions origination scale + asset-management fee growth; securitization lowers funding cost

bull.notes: Repeatable $50M+ securitizations; Abacus Intel tech fees ramp; dividend maintained

segments.label: Life Solutions (policy origination and servicing)
segments.evidence: FY2025 segment revenue $200.7M of $235.2M total; operating income consolidated $88.8M (10-K segment note)

segments.label: Asset Management (FCF Advisors and managed accounts)
segments.evidence: FY2025 segment revenue $33.8M; FCF Advisors acquired Dec 2024 (10-K Business section)

options.label: Life insurance policy portfolio (balance-sheet investments)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Policy investments carried at fair value on balance sheet; not modeled as separate terminal — embedded in Life Solutions cash path
options.evidence: Available-for-sale life settlement investments ~$500M+ on balance sheet (10-K Note 4); fair-value marks flow through earnings

options.label: Repeatable securitized funding (Oct 2025 $50M note)
options.evidence: 10-K: October 2025 $50M investment-grade securitized note; lowers cost of capital for Life Solutions growth

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Policy portfolio marked to fair value; equity $418M vs EV ~$1.3B at price (10-K balance sheet)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: All three reportable segments profitable at gross profit level FY2025

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Policy servicing fees and future mortality gains on owned policies not in GAAP OCF starting point

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No material private equity stakes disclosed

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Operating platform; $0.20 dividend is ongoing policy not recovery trade

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Securitization and tech verification embedded in Life Solutions growth assumption

growth_explanation.base_growth_mechanism: Roll-up of life-settlement originators (Carlisle 2024, FCF Advisors 2024) plus repeatable securitized funding should lift owner cash faster than FY2025 GAAP OCF implies.
falsifiers: Longevity improvements extend policy lives and compress returns
Credit spreads widen on ABXL notes or warehouse lines
Integration costs from acquisitions exceed disclosed $11.8M FY2025 add-backs

stance_proposal.rationale: Lawrence GAAP owner-cash IRR below 15% accumulate bar; leverage and mortality risk cap dhando despite revenue momentum

marvin_floor.notes: FY2025 GAAP free cash flow per share only

blended_best.weights: 100% Marvin GAAP floor (no approved third party)
blended_best.notes: Filings-only; adjusted EBITDA $1.34/sh not in Lawrence base
